zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Harington於1391年出生在英國爾胡頓時，她的父親Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton49歲，母親Isabel English41歲。她和Richard Sherburne至少有6個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於1444年11月3日享年53歲，埋葬在英國越可爾米頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Harington于1391年出生在英国爾胡頓时，她的父亲Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton49岁，母亲Isabel English41岁。她和Richard Sherburne至少有6个儿子和5个女儿。她去世于1444年11月3日享年53岁，埋葬在英国越可爾米頓。

nameMeanings.name: Harington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Harrington
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Harrington (Cumberland, Lincolnshire, Northamptonshire). The Cumberland placename derives from the Old English personal name Hæfer + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The Lincolnshire placename derives from the Old English personal name Hearra + Old English connective -ing- + tūn. The Northamptonshire derives from an Old English personal name Hǣthhere + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Herendeen .
Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hArrachtáin ‘descendant of Arrachtán’, a personal name from a diminutive of arrachtach ‘mighty, powerful’.
Irish: in Kerry, this name was adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hIongardail, later Ó hUrdáil, ‘descendant of Iongardal’, a personal name of uncertain origin.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Harington was born in 1391, in Hooton, Cheshire, England, her father, Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton, was 49 and her mother, Isabel English, was 41. She had at least 6 sons and 5 daughters with Richard Sherburne. She died on 3 November 1444, at the age of 53, and was buried in Mitton, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Harington est née en 1391, à Hooton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Isabel English, avait 41 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles avec Richard Sherburne. Elle est décédée le 3 novembre 1444, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Mitton, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Harington 1391 in Hooton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton 49 und ihre Mutter Isabel English 41. Sie hatte mit Richard Sherburne mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. November 1444 im Alter von 53 Jahren und wurde in Mitton, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Harington è nata il nel 1391 nel Hooton, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton, aveva 49 anni e sua madre, Isabel English, aveva 41 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie con Richard Sherburne. Morì il 3 novembre 1444, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a Mitton, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Haringtonが1391年にイギリスチェシュアイアホーオトンで生まれた時，父Sir Nicholas Harington of Farletonは49歳，母Isabel Englishは41歳であった。彼女はRichard Sherburneとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1444年11月3日に53歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアミットオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Harington(이)가 1391년 영국 체실르 후턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel English(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 Richard Sherburne(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1444년 11월 3일 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 미턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Harington nasceu em 1391, em Hooton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Isabel English, tinha 41 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas com Richard Sherburne. Ela faleceu em 3 de novembro de 1444, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Mitton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Harington родилась в 1391 г. в местности хутон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel English, 41. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей от Richard Sherburne. Она умерла 3 ноября 1444 г. в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности миттон, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Harington nació en 1391, en Hooton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Isabel English, tenía 41 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas con Richard Sherburne. Murió el 3 de noviembre de 1444, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Mitton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
